acceptanceCriteria: result_uri serves a JSON attestation listing request_id, job_id, price, solver and the accept tx hash of this job; result_hash is its SHA3-256.
description: Staged internal pilot of the /market on-chain choreography on the live compute rail (chain 8). Deliverable: a short attestation document (JSON) recording the full request/quote/accept lifecycle of this very job — request id, quote parameters, acceptance transaction — signed off by the provider. Mini budget on purpose; this run proves the rail, not the workload.
title: Compute Pilot 001 — market rail rehearsal (mini budget)
